THE CONTRACT PROVIDES THAT DEFENDANT CAN SHARE FEES WITH OTHER ATTORNEYS ASSOCIATED INTO THE CASE. PLAINTIFF IS RAISING DISPUTED FACTUAL ISSUES THAT SHOULD BE RESOLVED BY SUMMARY JUDGMENT. AMENDED DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-22-2007 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: CROSS-DEFENDANT CHRISTINE LOPEZ AMENDED DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT OF JEFFREY L. KRULL.
APPEARANCES: Linda Ross, Esq. of Law Offices of Linda Ross 563-2400 for x-deft & moving party; Laura E. Perrault, Esq. of Roeca Haas Hager LLP 901-4205 for x-complainant Jeffrey L. Krull & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE COURT IS OBLIGED TO TAKE DEFENDANT'S ALLEGATIONS AS TRUE. THE CROSS-COMPLAINT ALLEGES THAT DEFENDANT PERFORMED THE CONTRACT. THE CONTRACT PROVIDES THAT DEFENDANT CAN SHARE FEES WITH OTHER ATTORNEYS ASSOCIATED INTO THE CASE. PLAINTIFF IS RAISING DISPUTED FACTUAL ISSUES THAT SHOULD BE RESOLVED BY SUMMARY JUDGMENT. (302/JKS/PB) JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR #4761
